description: Title Registration — processes vehicle title transfers, validates VIN integrity, NMVTIS checks, odometer fraud detection, and lienholder verification

hard_stops.label: VIN Checksum Failure
hard_stops.logic: VIN fails ISO 3779 / 49 CFR 565 check-digit validation — cannot process title with invalid VIN

hard_stops.label: NMVTIS Title Problem Indicator
hard_stops.logic: NMVTIS returns title_problem_indicator = true — title may be branded, salvage, or flood; requires manual review

hard_stops.label: Odometer Rollback Detected
hard_stops.logic: Reported odometer reading is less than the most recent prior recorded reading — potential odometer fraud per 49 USC 32703

hard_stops.label: Lienholder Not in ELT Provider List
hard_stops.logic: Declared lienholder is not a recognized Electronic Lien and Title (ELT) provider — cannot electronically process lien notation

hard_stops.label: Duplicate Title Request
hard_stops.logic: A title transfer for this VIN was already submitted within the last 3 business days — possible duplicate or fraud

hard_stops.label: DPPA Permissible Use Not Logged
hard_stops.logic: Driver's Privacy Protection Act (18 USC 2721) permissible use purpose code not recorded before accessing personal data

hard_stops.label: Fee Payment Not Confirmed
hard_stops.logic: Title transfer fee payment_intent_id not confirmed as settled — cannot issue title without confirmed payment

soft_flags.label: High-Value Transfer
soft_flags.logic: Purchase price exceeds $75,000 — flag for enhanced review and possible luxury tax assessment

soft_flags.label: Out-of-State Title
soft_flags.logic: Seller's current title was issued by a different state — verify reciprocity and title brand portability
